cells.rationale: Early proof point introducing a new policy config, drift gate, task-JSON schema field, and byte-parity brief contract on a mid-refactor surface — a misread abstraction propagates to every downstream task.
Contract-sensitive VCS facade plus commit_set_hash-stability and audit-schema-version constraints with many degrade arms, where a wrong hash-input change trips in-flight audits.
Prose-only but intelligence-sensitive prompt engineering of autonomous review depth, refute logic, and fingerprint dedup with strict report/verdict contract preservation and no unit-test safety net.

The crux gate riding block machinery — highest blast radius with idempotent per-task hashing, parallel-lane clobber safety, refute loop, resume-budget accounting, and reap-window interactions where a wrong contract wedges the board.

Bounded single-surface daemon escalation change with a named root cause and precedents, but invariant-sensitive (producer-side liveness, change-gate discipline) so it stays on the high-capability tier.
